summary: Excellent audience recording of a classic Shrine show, highlighted by a blistering Scarlet Begonias and the rolling Dancin’→Wharf Rat→Dancin' medley.
review: The performance is consistently praised – Jerry’s lead work is described as “firing on all cylinders,” Scarlet Begonias is called jaw‑droppingly fierce, and the Dancin’ → Wharf Rat → Dancin’ sequence turns heads. The source is an audience (AUD) tape that many note sounds among the best of 1976 Shrine recordings, though a few wish it were a bit clearer.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical praise across most reviews (70% weight) and generally good to excellent audience recording quality (30% weight) lead to a high combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear and lively; regarded as one of the best‑sounding 1976 AUD tapes, though some note it could be crisper.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set rolls smoothly, especially the second set; the Dancin’/Wharf Rat medley and Scarlet Begonias keep the energy high throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Multiple reviewers highlight Jerry firing on all cylinders with exceptional guitar work.
